tool.name: Atomic Agents
tool.description: Minimalist agent framework emphasizing composability and predictable building blocks.
tool.logoNotes: Official Atomic Agents logo asset from the owner-controlled Eigenwise/atomic-agents repo (`.assets/logo.png`), committed here as an optimized downscaled copy for badge use.
tool.practitionerNote: Best suited to teams that want minimal abstractions and tight control, not large batteries-included enterprise workflow tooling.

deployment.detail: pip-installed OSS framework; no managed hosting.

auditLogging.detail: Minimalist design; observability is intentionally operator-configured.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; SOC 2 applies to the operator's infrastructure, not the package.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 27001 applies to the operator's ISMS, not the package.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; ISO 42001 applies to the deploying organisation.

euAiAct.detail: Developer component, not an AI system placed on the market; obligations rest with the deployer.
